nasb.text: Then Achish said to his servants, “Behold, you see the man behaving as a madman. Why do you bring him to me?

esv.text: Then Achish said to his servants, “Behold, you see the man is mad. Why then have you brought him to me?

cnv.text: 亞吉就對他的臣僕說：“你們看，這個人瘋了，你們為甚麼把他帶到我這裡來呢？

ccb.text: 亚吉对臣仆说：“你们看，这是个疯子，为什么把他带到我这里来？
